title: Bee Mastery
description: Bee Mastery expands Forestry: Community Edition with 11 unique bee species, legendary tools, and powerful frames. Breed agricultural, livestock, and elite bees. Progress from humble beginnings to apicultural supremacy. Successor to ForestryExtras.
body:
Master the art of beekeeping with Bee Mastery, a comprehensive expansion for Forestry: Community Edition!

**What is Bee Mastery?**
Bee Mastery is the spiritual successor to the beloved ForestryExtras mod, completely rebuilt for Minecraft 1.20.1+ while preserving the original vision. This mod adds 11 unique bee species, advanced equipment, and a complete progression system from basic apiculture to legendary mastery.

**Key Features:**
🐝 11 Unique Bee Species - Agricultural, Livestock, and Elite tiers
🔧 Legendary Tools - Scoops and Grafters with enhanced durability and abilities
🖼️ 10 Bee Frames - From basic Coal to game-changing Legendary frames
💎 New Materials - Draconic, Legendary, Reinforced, Witheria, and Mutated Iron
🧬 Complete Progression - Start with Potato bees, end with Legendary tier
🎨 Original Textures - Preserved from the classic ForestryExtras

**Bee Species:**
- Agricultural: Potato, Carrot (produce crops)
- Livestock: Pig, Cow, Sheep (produce animal products)
- Resource: Clayious (produces clay)
- Advanced: Reinforced, Mutated (enhanced materials)
- Elite: Witheria, Draconic, Legendary (ultimate tier)

**Advanced Equipment:**
- Scoops: Break hives faster, catch vanilla bees, 300-10,000 durability
- Grafters: 3x-10x sapling drop rates, long-lasting
- Frames: Up to 10x mutation chance and 5x production boost

**Perfect For:**
- Forestry CE enthusiasts looking for more content
- Players who enjoyed the original ForestryExtras
- Anyone who wants to expand their apiculture empire

**Requirements:**
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.2.0+
- Forestry: Community Edition 7.0.0+

**Credits:**
Original ForestryExtras by wasliebob. Rebuilt and maintained by Elias Friedlaender for the modern Minecraft era.
